metadata.subject: RE: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update

risks.description: Vendor delivery delayed by 2 weeks, threatening NGIS Phase 3 migration timeline

evidence_refs.excerpt: confirmed a 2-week delay on the network equipment originally scheduled to arrive at your Gatineau facility on March 6

risks.description: No backup supplier identified for critical network equipment — single-sourced risk

evidence_refs.excerpt: currently single-sourced on this product line through our Montreal warehouse

risks.description: Alternative routing adds 3–5 business days, extending critical delay further

evidence_refs.excerpt: alternative routing via our Vancouver depot would add a further 3–5 business days

GC-CLOUD WAVE 4 — MONTHLY STATUS REPORT
Reporting Period: February 2026
Report Date: March 1, 2026
Project Manager: Carol Nguyen
Status: GREEN

---

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

GC-Cloud Wave 4 is progressing excellently. The team has made strong
progress across all workstreams and stakeholder engagement remains high.
We are confident in our ability to deliver the project on schedule and
within the approved parameters.

---

SCHEDULE HIGHLIGHTS

of $2,400,000 is insufficient. The assess

llm_calls.content:
```json
[
  {
    "description": "Contradiction regarding project budget status and financial health",
    "doc_a_artifact_id": "art_ec8e1781d8",
    "doc_b_artifact_id": "art_f2e46b768d",
    "doc_a_excerpt": "The project is within budget. Expenditures to date total $412,000 against an approved budget of $2,400,000 (17% spent). We have no budget concerns at this time and expect to deliver within the approved envelope.",
    "doc_b_artifact_id": "art_f2e46b768d",
    "doc_b_excerpt": "The original budget of $2,400,000 is insufficient... Estimated cost of remediation: $340,000. Revised Projected Cost: $2,740,000 — representing a budget overrun of $340,000 (approximately 14% above approved envelope).",
    "severity": "critical"
  },
  {
    "description": "Contradiction regarding project schedule status and delivery timeline risk",
    "doc_a_artifact_id": "art_ec8e1781d8",
    "doc_b_artifact_id": "art_f2e46b768d",
    "doc_a_excerpt": "The project remains on track to meet its Q3 2026 delivery commitment... The project is progressing according to the approved baseline schedule.",
    "doc_b_artifact_id": "art_f2e46b768d",
    "doc_b_excerpt": "The Q3 2026 delivery target is now uncertain. The project manager has been advised to reassess the schedule baseline... Timeline at risk.",
    "severity": "critical"
  },
  {
    "description": "Contradiction regarding the existence and status of identified risks",
    "doc_a_artifact_id": "art_ec8e1781d8",
    "doc_b_artifact_id": "art_f2e46b768d",
    "doc_a_excerpt": "The project risk profile is low. Our risk register contains three risks, all rated Low. No risk escalations are required.",
    "doc_b_artifact_id": "art_f2e46b768d",
    "doc_b_excerpt": "The assessment revealed mandatory middleware remediation requirements that were not captured in the initial scope... Budget overrun confirmed. Timeline at risk.",
    "severity": "high"
  },
  {
    "description": "Contradiction regarding the completion status of the infrastructure assessment phase",
    "doc_a_artifact_id": "art_ec8e1781d8",
    "doc_b_artifact_id": "art_f2e46b768d",
    "doc_a_excerpt": "The infrastructure assessment phase concluded on time on February 25. We are now entering the procurement and planning phase as planned.",
    "doc_b_artifact_id": "art_f2e46b768d",
    "doc_b_excerpt": "Following the infrastructure assessment completed February 25, the project team has identified that the original budget... is insufficient. The middleware remediation will require an estimated three weeks of additional effort before cloud migration workloads can begin.",
    "severity": "high"
  }
]
```

parsed_json.description: Contradiction regarding project budget status and financial health
parsed_json.doc_a_excerpt: The project is within budget. Expenditures to date total $412,000 against an approved budget of $2,400,000 (17% spent). We have no budget concerns at this time and expect to deliver within the approved envelope.
parsed_json.doc_b_excerpt: The original budget of $2,400,000 is insufficient... Estimated cost of remediation: $340,000. Revised Projected Cost: $2,740,000 — representing a budget overrun of $340,000 (approximately 14% above approved envelope).

parsed_json.description: Contradiction regarding project schedule status and delivery timeline risk
parsed_json.doc_a_excerpt: The project remains on track to meet its Q3 2026 delivery commitment... The project is progressing according to the approved baseline schedule.
parsed_json.doc_b_excerpt: The Q3 2026 delivery target is now uncertain. The project manager has been advised to reassess the schedule baseline... Timeline at risk.

parsed_json.description: Contradiction regarding the existence and status of identified risks
parsed_json.doc_a_excerpt: The project risk profile is low. Our risk register contains three risks, all rated Low. No risk escalations are required.
parsed_json.doc_b_excerpt: The assessment revealed mandatory middleware remediation requirements that were not captured in the initial scope... Budget overrun confirmed. Timeline at risk.

parsed_json.description: Contradiction regarding the completion status of the infrastructure assessment phase
parsed_json.doc_a_excerpt: The infrastructure assessment phase concluded on time on February 25. We are now entering the procurement and planning phase as planned.
parsed_json.doc_b_excerpt: Following the infrastructure assessment completed February 25, the project team has identified that the original budget... is insufficient. The middleware remediation will require an estimated three weeks of additional effort before cloud migration workloads can begin.

artifact.content_preview:
From: security.audit@tbs-sct.gc.ca
To: ngis-pm@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: itsec-director@ssc-spc.gc.ca; ciso@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: URGENT: ITSG-33 Compliance Gap — NGIS Phase 3 Network Migration
Date: Thu, 5 Mar 2026 08:47:15 -0500

Project Management Team,

During the scheduled ITSG-33 security compliance review for NGIS Phase 3
(review conducted February 28–March 4, 2026), our audit team identified
a Category 2 finding that must be addressed before the migration proceeds.

FINDING SUMMARY:
Control: IA

extracted_tasks.text: action plan by end of day March 6.

Subject: URGENT: ITSG-33 Compliance Gap — NGIS Phase 3 Network Migration

Project Management Team,

During the scheduled ITSG-33 security compliance review for NGIS Phase 3
(review conducted February 28–March 4, 2026), our audit team identified
a Category 2 finding that must be addressed before the migration proceeds.

Control: IA
